horoscope: Any pressure building in a friendship or a project can emerge for your attention today, dear Aries. Today's Mars-Pluto aspect can point to emerging resentments related to differing values or issues of respect. If you've kept too much to yourself, the stress can get to you now. Areas of tension may concern belongings, ownership, money, boundaries, possessiveness, or respect. You want to hold your own with Mars currently transiting your solar second house, and if you are in a position to depend on others, it can be more frustrating than usual! You'd be wise to confront the problem if your fear of losing someone or something prevents you from enjoying your life and finding your way. While events can stir resentment now, the good news is that you have a decent chance of identifying deeper problems. As well, tomorrow's transits help you harness this energy and use it constructively.

Today’s Mars-Pluto square can stir some competitive feelings, dear Taurus. It’s personal because Mars is currently transiting your sign, and your desire to assert your independence or go your own way and do your own thing is stronger than usual. However, the pressure to keep cool or stick to the rules is also in place, creating a dilemma. Ideally, you reach a compromise, but you might consider dialing back your ambitions a bit to reduce excess stress. It may very well be that you can do so without loss. You have all sorts of exciting ideas and plans, but putting too much energy into new efforts can get you behind on current responsibilities and projects. Stress comes today if you push processes that should be allowed to unfold over time. Fortunately, you'll be able to channel this energy for constructive purposes, particularly with the help of tomorrow's transits.

Mars in your solar twelfth house these days is generally quiet and replenishing, dear Gemini. With today's somewhat picky aspects, however, it's not an ideal time to take shortcuts or vent your frustrations. A difference of opinion could get you more riled up than usual, and it's hard to do or think of much else! You might find yourself fixated on an unresolved, frustrating matter as Mars forms a square with Pluto. You're likely to feel unprepared, and the key to easing pressure is to identify areas where you've been micromanaging or trying to control, and then consciously ease off a little. It can be challenging to focus or concentrate with so much on your mind, but if you work on this, the goal is to diffuse and decompress. Fears can magnify to larger-than-life proportions when it comes to Pluto, and addressing their origins can help manage tensions. Consider seeking perspective or advice from someone who's not as close to the situation, as this can provide valuable support. Fortunately, we're also approaching a helpful Sun-Pluto transit, and how to channel this energy well will soon become clear.

Transits today tend to turn your attention to your deeper issues or a lingering problem, dear Cancer. It may be time to eliminate a habit that doesn’t work in your favor, but it’s not straightforward, and baby steps may be necessary! Perhaps it’s a superstition, fear, or another attitude that gives the power up to something or someone else instead of keeping it for yourself. A Mars-Pluto square highlights this today. People can be stubborn right now, and areas where you feel drained of energy, time, or money become more evident. Try to keep your wits about you and avoid short-sighted decision-making. If power dynamics are an issue, perhaps there are ways to manage and share power as you advance. Today’s energies are complicated, but reactions to problems can be highly revealing. Priorities may be hard to decide, but giving yourself some time can help things fall into place. Plus, tomorrow's Sun-Pluto trine can help you find ways to channel these energies constructively.

Mars in your solar tenth house these days can stir your ambitions, dear Leo. While it's often a motivating influence, Mars clashes with Pluto today, which can pull up a conflict between a relationship and your duties, responsibilities, or worldly or strategic goals. Watch for taking on too much or overemphasizing one to the detriment of another. You should have room for both in your life, and if one drive is taking over, it’s a sign to ease some pressure. People close to you can seem quite demanding or even pushy right now, or you may feel caught in the middle of a power struggle. Still, interactions might bring your fear of change in your relationships to the surface. Your first reaction may be to scramble to regain or maintain control, but such attempts can lead to undesirable outcomes. Aim to rise above your fears and find that sweet spot of balance. With your ruler, the Sun, heading into harmony with Pluto, help to channel this energy constructively is on its way.

Mars in your spirit sector these days boosts your energy and motivation, dear Virgo. However, a Mars-Pluto challenge can find you getting fired up over an issue today, but outlets for expressing yourself seem limited. Instead, the desire to advance your work or health is at odds with your need to expand, learn, and experience life firsthand. It can be challenging to ease off in either area. Mind you, with Pluto transiting your solar sixth house, work and health are areas you're more likely to overdo or where you're so ambitious that other areas of your life are suffering. If these things keep you from venturing out and experiencing more of life, it's time to find ways to strike a balance. With this tense aspect, it may not be easy to know when to let go of an argument, line of thought, or activity, but it's best to avoid pushing. Fears tend to magnify problem areas today. Think about ways to share the load or divide your time more efficiently so that you can catch a break. Fortunately, with the Sun moving into harmony with Pluto, channeling this energy constructively will soon become more natural to you.

Your impulses tend to be intense today, dear Libra. The tendency to dwell runs high, but you might choose to use intense emotions and compulsions constructively--something that comes more naturally as the day advances. Mars in your intimacy sector stirs up all sorts of previously buried matter, and it conflicts with Pluto today, possibly aggravating tensions in relationships or on an emotional level. Resentments can surface if someone isn’t taking you seriously. Your excitement may not be mirrored, which can be frustrating, or there can be questions about how involved you want to be with a project. So much is riding on a relationship or project that it’s losing its fun factor, or it could even be taking over your life in destructive ways. If so, it may be time to take steps to even things out. There may be a standoff or unexpected event related to finances or relationship dynamics. This transit helps show you where you’ve been overdoing, micromanaging, or unnecessarily fearful. Aim to recognize the need to let go of something just a little if your grip is too tight. The Moon's move into your sign today signals a need to pay more attention to your emotions.

Mars in your partnership sector these days can animate your relationships, dear Scorpio, bringing out problems or issues so you can put them behind you. Today, Mars is heading to a square with Pluto, and frustrations with others could run high, or resentful feelings can emerge. You could feel that someone is more often putting their agenda ahead of yours. It’s possible you feel torn between the wants and needs of others and your own feelings and fears. If you’ve been holding on too tightly to a situation, it’s time to try to ease off and release some pressure. Consider that impulsiveness and impatience can be problematic right now. You’ll be in the best shape if you take time to relax, center yourself, and pursue your ambitions later. If you have too much going on in all areas of your life, you’ll feel the imbalance more acutely now, prompting the need to pare things down. It’s a good time to let go of something negative or useless in your life, however, and tomorrow's Sun-Pluto transit can help you find positive channels for all this energy.

With Mars transiting your sector of work, health, and habits until June 28th, dear Sagittarius, you're often feeling more motivated and energetic when tackling your daily affairs. However, as Mars and Pluto head into a square today, it's best to stay attentive and aware, as there's a tendency to push matters that can inadvertently invite more problems. While competition can be beneficial, this transit tends to put pressure on you. Your desire to address an intolerable situation is intense today, making it challenging to walk away from conflict! If you find yourself dwelling on something to your detriment, or if the need to be right has caused unhealthy tension, it's time to work on strategies to reduce stress. Changes in communications or approaches might help. This transit is about letting go of projects, ideas, or attitudes that keep you from thriving and growing. But first, it's important to see what's holding you back and approach your work and health with moderation to avoid unnecessary stress and conflicts. Fortunately, a Sun-Pluto transit is also coming into influence, helping you channel this energy constructively.

Mars in your sector of joy until June 28th is quite supportive energetically, dear Capricorn. Still, with a Mars-Pluto square now, you may feel some concerns and worries that pressure you today. This transit can leave you feeling conflicted on an emotional level about your feelings towards someone. Instead, there can be tensions or disagreements related to money, ownership, or values. Ideally, through them, you can learn a lot about yourself and your situation. The goal is to manage fears and insecurities that have prevented you from following your heart, pursuing love, or expressing yourself creatively. It may not be easy to fully back a decision today, as there is a sense that something is exaggerated or magnified, good or bad. Resolve not to worry about what–or how–someone is communicating since it’s too easy to misinterpret their words today. We're also heading toward a helpful Sun-Pluto transit, and handling tension stirring today in constructive ways will soon come more naturally.

Mars is transiting your solar fourth house until June 28th, dear Aquarius, stirring up buried matter on an emotional level and energizing your home and personal life. Still, it's forming a challenging square with Pluto right now, highlighting how these things conflict with your plans and need for independence. It's best to prioritize self-care during these times, as you may need to loosen your grip on a matter that keeps you on high alert or under too much stress for your own good. This will allow you to breathe and decompress as you recognize the need to relax and detox. Your strong sense of pride and privacy may trip you up sometimes as Pluto transits your sign, as you tend to shoulder many responsibilities without sharing the load. Be careful not to alienate others. As frustrating as they may be, aggravations are likely to be temporary. Working on matters of independence is a worthy mission, but it takes time! We also head toward a Sun-Pluto trine that helps you focus your energies and use them constructively.

Mars is moving in harmony with your sign until June 28th, dear Pisces, helping to subtly boost your energy and motivation. Today, however, a Mars-Pluto aspect at play can ramp up tensions. This influence can aggravate lingering control issues. You may feel tense about deadlines or impatient with matters that aren’t accelerating at the pace you’d like. There can be uneasy feelings, words, or thoughts, but it’s an excellent time to recognize anger if it’s hanging around so that you can deal with it. Consider that guardedness of your privacy and unwillingness to explore the deeper issues may aggravate tensions unnecessarily. Something you’ve swept under the carpet may be better dealt with than avoided since it can emerge in disruptive ways otherwise. The tendency to fixate on a specific topic or idea can be positive when applied to a project that requires extra attention, as long as you avoid pushing too hard. Under today’s transits, worries and concerns seem to magnify, and you may want to watch for a tendency to see the best or the worst of a situation rather than merely seeing it for what it’s worth. Fortunately, we're also approaching a Sun-Pluto trine that helps you focus this energy constructively.
